parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter assets by lifecycle/status value from integration.

parameters.name: billingAccountId
parameters.description: Filter assets by billing account identifier.

parameters.name: dateFrom
parameters.description: Include assets created/updated from this date (ISO string).

parameters.name: dateTo
parameters.description: Include assets created/updated until this date (ISO string).

parameters.name: locale
parameters.description: Optional locale code used to localize response values.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Asset list filters and pagination query.
